creator: frederic@culot.org
text:
Vendor replied on September 9, indicating it would not be possible to update the
distfile name:

---
Hi, Frederic and Simon,

Thanks very much for your work on the FreeBSD port of When.
I'm afraid that I haven't gotten around to making the
requested change in the naming conventions, and considering
how long your emials have sat in my in-box, I'd better admit
that I'm not likely to get to it. Sorry.

	Ben
